Audit Regulation (537/2014/EU) and Statutory Audits Directive (2014/56/EU) — Big Four reform post-Parmalat
Money Market Funds Regulation (2017/1131/EU) — preventing a repeat of 2008 'breaking the buck'
Capital Requirements Directive V (CRD V, 2019/878/EU) — Basel III implementation in EU law
Payment Services Regulation (PSR, 2023 proposal) — open banking 2.0 replacing PSD2
Listing Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/2809) — making EU capital markets competitive with New York and London
Temporary Agency Work Directive (2008/104/EC) — equal treatment for temps after a decade of UK and German blocking
Information and Consultation Directive (2002/14/EC) — Renault Vilvoorde closure shock and employee rights
Young Workers Directive (94/33/EC) — EU minimum age and protections for child labour
Seasonal Workers Directive (2014/36/EU) — protecting agricultural migrant workers from exploitation
Rome I Regulation (593/2008/EC) — applicable law for cross-border contractual obligations
Rome II Regulation (864/2007/EC) — applicable law for cross-border non-contractual obligations
Brussels IIb Regulation (2019/1111/EU) — parental responsibility and international child abduction
Insolvency Regulation recast (2015/848/EU) — COMI shopping and forum shopping in corporate bankruptcies
European Account Preservation Order (655/2014/EU) — freezing bank accounts across borders
European Order for Payment Procedure (1896/2006/EC) — cross-border debt recovery without court hearings
Nutrition and Health Claims Regulation (1924/2006/EC) — industry health claims and the 'low fat' wars
Plant Protection Products Regulation (1107/2009/EC) — glyphosate and the EU pesticide authorisation system
Zoonoses Directive (2003/99/EC) and Salmonella Control Regulation (2160/2003/EC) — food safety monitoring
Fisheries Control Regulation recast (2023/2842/EU) — electronic logbooks and IUU fishing enforcement
Anti-Coercion Instrument (2023/2675/EU) — EU response to China's trade blockade of Lithuania
Generalised Scheme of Preferences Regulation (2023/1010/EU) — trade as human rights leverage
Foreign Direct Investment Screening Regulation (2019/452/EU) — EU security screening for foreign takeovers
Cross-Border Conversions, Mergers and Divisions Directive (2019/2121/EU) — corporate mobility within the EU
European Cooperative Society Regulation (1435/2003/EC) — worker-owned companies across EU borders
Schengen Information System Regulation (2018/1861/EU) — Europe's largest law enforcement database
Visa Information System Regulation (2021/1134/EU) — biometric data and border control
Erasmus+ Programme Regulation (2021/817/EU) — from 3,000 students in 1987 to 600,000 per year
LIFE Programme Regulation (2021/783/EU) — EU's oldest and flagship environment and climate fund
Connecting Europe Facility Regulation (2021/1153/EU) — funding trans-European transport, energy and digital networks
Just Transition Fund Regulation (2021/1056/EU) — coal region transition and the political cost of decarbonisation
Reception Conditions Directive recast (2024/1346/EU) — detention and housing standards for asylum seekers
Crisis and Force Majeure Regulation (2024/1359/EU) — New Pact on Migration emergency provisions
Single Permit Directive recast (2024/3227/EU) — one permit for work and residence for third-country nationals
